description: Starter prompt templates for common use cases. Each has a ready-to-use task description (with a [TOPIC] placeholder to fill in) and a suggested technique bundle from prompt_expert_methodology.json's quick_reference.

templates.title: Create an online course
templates.task: Design a complete online course on [TOPIC], including a syllabus with weekly modules, learning objectives for each module, suggested assessments, and a final capstone project.

templates.title: Write a report
templates.task: Write a structured report on [TOPIC], covering background/context, current state, key findings, risks, and concrete recommendations.

templates.title: Analyze a debate
templates.task: Analyze the debate around [TOPIC]: present the strongest arguments on each side, identify where they actually disagree versus talk past each other, and assess which claims are best supported by evidence.

templates.title: Write a technical spec
templates.task: Write a technical specification for [TOPIC]: problem statement, goals and non-goals, proposed design, alternatives considered, edge cases, and rollout plan.

templates.title: Code review checklist
templates.task: Produce a thorough code review checklist for [TOPIC] (e.g. a language, framework, or type of change), covering correctness, security, performance, readability, and test coverage.

templates.title: Product launch plan
templates.task: Create a launch plan for [TOPIC]: target audience, positioning, launch timeline with milestones, marketing channels, success metrics, and risks to watch for.

templates.title: Interview preparation
templates.task: Prepare me for an interview about [TOPIC]: likely questions, strong example answers structured around real experience, follow-up questions to expect, and questions I should ask the interviewer.

templates.title: Research summary
templates.task: Summarize the current state of research/knowledge on [TOPIC]: key findings, areas of consensus, open questions or disagreements, and the most credible sources to go deeper.

templates.title: Marketing campaign
templates.task: Design a marketing campaign for [TOPIC]: target segments, core message, channel mix, content calendar outline, and how to measure success.

templates.title: Personal learning plan
templates.task: Create a self-study learning plan to become proficient in [TOPIC] within a reasonable timeframe: prerequisites, phased milestones, recommended resources per phase, and how to test my own progress.
